name: whatsapp-rust-bridge
description: A high-performance utilities for WhatsApp, powered by Rust and WebAssembly.
author: João Lucas <jlucaso@hotmail.com>

scripts.bench: bun run build && bun run benches/binary.ts && bun run benches/signal.ts && bun run benches/curve.ts && bun run benches/crypto.ts
scripts.bench:node: bun run build && node --expose-gc benches/binary.ts && node --expose-gc benches/signal.ts && node --expose-gc benches/curve.ts && node --expose-gc benches/crypto.ts
scripts.gen:bridge-types: cd codegen && cargo run -q --bin gen-types --target $(rustc -vV | grep host | cut -d' ' -f2) > ../src/generated_types.rs.tmp && mv ../src/generated_types.rs.tmp ../src/generated_types.rs
scripts.gen: bun run gen:bridge-types && bun run gen:proto-types
scripts.build:ts: bun build ts/index.ts --minify --outfile dist/index.js --target node && cp pkg/whatsapp_rust_bridge_bg.wasm dist/ && cp ts/proto-types.d.ts dist/proto-types.d.ts && printf 'export { proto } from "./index.js";\n' > dist/proto-types.js
scripts.postbuild: tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir dist && rm -f dist/macro.d.ts && rm -rf dist/generated
scripts.build: bun run gen && bun run build:wasm && bun run build:ts && bun run postbuild
scripts.build:dev: bun run gen && bun run build:wasm:dev && bun run build:ts && bun run postbuild
scripts.build:profile: cargo build --profile profiling --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir pkg --keep-debug target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/profiling/whatsapp_rust_bridge.wasm && wasm-tools strip pkg/whatsapp_rust_bridge_bg.wasm -o pkg/whatsapp_rust_bridge_bg.wasm && bun run build:ts && bun run postbuild
scripts.bump:wacore: cargo update -p whatsapp-rust && bun run build
